scripts.db:local:up: docker compose --env-file deployment/local/data/.env -f deployment/local/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres
scripts.db:local:migrate: docker compose --env-file deployment/local/data/.env -f deployment/local/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres && sh ./deployment/run-flyway-migrations.sh local
scripts.build: bun x tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.domain.json && bun run --filter '*' build
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.domain.json && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
